```python from flask import Flask, jsonify, request import requests app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/api/locations', methods=['GET']) def get_locations(): business_name = request.args.get('business_name') if not business_name: return jsonify({'error': 'Business name is required'}), 400 # Example API call to a hypothetical external service response = requests.get(f'https://api.example.com/locations?name={business_name}') if response.status_code != 200: return jsonify({'error': 'Failed to fetch locations'}), 500 locations = response.json() return jsonify(locations), 200 if __name__ == '__main__': app.run(debug=True) ``` ### Sample HTML Page to Demo API Results ```html Business Locations

Business Locations Finder
